headline: BNP Paribas Maintains Neutral on Nordson, Raises Price Target to $290
summary: BNP Paribas  analyst Andrew Buscaglia   maintains Nordson (NASDAQ:NDSN) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $285 to $290.
